# backend/workers/tasks.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-13T10:03:13Z

## Purpose
Celery tasks for the BEV Analytics platform.

Tasks:
    train_model       — load data, train a model, log to MLflow
    predict           — load model from MLflow, run prediction
    run_pipeline      — orchestrate a full ML pipeline for a department

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import logging
- from `_` import os
- from `_` import sys
- from `pathlib` import Path
- from `typing` import Any
- from `celery` import Task
- from `celery.exceptions` import SoftTimeLimitExceeded
- from `workers.celery_app` import celery_app

## Inputs
- Env vars: BEV_DATA_ROOT, BEV_OLLAMA_HOST, REDIS_URL

## Process
### Functions
- `_get_pipeline(department_id, pipeline_name)`: Lazy import a pipeline class by department / pipeline name.
- `train_model(self, model_id, dataset_path, algorithm, params)`: Train an ML model and log artefacts to MLflow.
- `predict(self, model_id, model_run_id, input_data, algorithm)`: Load a trained model from MLflow and run inference.
- `run_pipeline(self, department_id, pipeline_name, dataset_path, params)`: Run a full ML pipeline for a department.
- `run_structured_lifecycle(self)`: Run the full structured-ML lifecycle (EDA → eval → SHAP) and persist
- `run_rag_lifecycle(self)`: Run the full RAG lifecycle: chunk → embed → index → retrieve → answer → cite.
- `dispatch_test_fanout(self)`: Fan out a test-tier dispatch across all given depts.
- `_cron_audit_dir(job_name)`: (no docstring)
- `_cron_disabled(env_name)`: (no docstring)
- `refresh_data_artifacts(self)`: DATA cron — per dept: re-ingest, dedup, IQR-flag, impute, freshness check.
- `retrain_models(self)`: MODEL cron — per dept × pipeline: invoke the appropriate lifecycle.train().
- `eval_accuracy_drift(self)`: ACCURACY cron — scan latest pipeline manifests for accuracy drift.
- `analysis_rollup(self)`: ANALYSIS cron — per dept: aggregate KPIs from existing dashboard catalog.

## Outputs
- Writes files (detected 1 patterns)
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- Ensure backend package is importable when Celery starts the worker
- ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
- Pipeline registry — maps department names to pipeline classes
- ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
- Use explicit pipeline_name override if provided
